title: Mjolnir
description: Wield the power of Thor's hammer!
body:
# Mjolnir (Alpha)
Mjolnir adds a hybrid hammer built for combat and mining, powered by lightning.
- 11 Attack Damage
- 11 Throwing Damage
- 0.8 Attack Speed
- 6200 Durability

## Key Features

### Movement
- **Charge Dash**: `Hold Right-Click` to charge and release to dash; also recieving Slow Falling.

### Combat
- **Lightning Strike**: `Left-Click` normal hits call down thunder, and you are immune to your own lightning.
- **Throw Ability**: `Crouch + Hold Right-Click` to charge a throw; on hit it strikes lightning and returns to you.

### Mining
- **Lightning Shards**: Mining can break nearby blocks in a random sphere, with electric spark particles.
- **Vein Mining**: All ores (including Ancient Debris) chain-break with an audible sound.
- **Bedrock Clash**: Bedrock is unbreakable, but smashing it detonates a nearby sphere with an explosion effect.

### Ritual (Mace -> Mjolnir)
`Left-Click` a powered, Tier 1 Beacon built with a Netherite Block underneath the Beacon and Gold Blocks around it **while holding a Mace**. Lightning strikes, the weather turns to rain, and the Mace transforms into Mjolnir.

### Repair
Place the Mjolnir in an Anvil and repair it with Netherite Ingots.

## Future Plans
- New Sprite Texture: [VOTE NOW](https://github.com/dmor-me/Mjolnir/discussions/1) on Github.
- Community Driven Ideas & Changes: [Github Discussions](https://github.com/dmor-me/Mjolnir/discussions) or [Discord Server](https://discord.com/invite/TCW9uUbWs2)
- Proper (Neo)Forge versions.
- More Abilities: Ground Slam AOE?
- Custom Particles/Sounds Set.
- Low Durability Sprite.
- In-Game Tutorial (Patchouli or GuideME).
- Advancements?
- Backports?
